step_rationale: AMI diagnostic marker with high AUC; acute-phase metabolite response to myocardial necrosis.
mechanism: Vitamin-A metabolite biomarker diagnostic of acute myocardial infarction via metabolic disruption in ischemia.

references.title: Metabolic Profiling Reveals Diagnostic Biomarkers for Distinguishing Myocarditis From Acute Myocardial Infarction.
